title: Car Cleaning Brush Set, 5 PCS Car Detailing Brushes, Auto Car Detailing Brush, Car Brush Interior for Cleaning Interior Exterior Wheels Rims and Leather
features: 【High Quality】: Made of high-quality food-grade plastic and upgraded microfiber, the bow handle feels comfortable and has no metal parts in the handle to prevent the brush from scratching the paint and surface when it accidentally hits the car.

【Car Cleaning Brush】: Dust removal soft bristle brush set has 3 pieces detail brushes and 2 pieces vent cleaning brushes for car. It can be used to clean door engines, handles, air vents, center consoles, front bumpers and other places.

【Comfortable grip handle】: Our detailing brush set has a comfortable grip that complements the ergonomic design. The groove design provides a comfortable grip with no metal parts. clean your car quickly and easily.
【Wide Occasions】This multifunctional brush is very suitable for wet and dry use, and can effectively clean every corner of the car, and can even be used as a blush powder makeup brush.
【100 % Guaranteed】: Each of our car detailing brushes all offer unprecedented quality and reliable service. If you have any questions, please contact us by email.
description: Car Detailing Brush Set, 5 PCS Car Detailing Brushes, Car Cleaning Brush Auto Car Detailing Brush Car Brush Interior Auto Dash Duster Brush Car Interior Detailing Brushes Soft Car Interior cleaning Brushes Feature 1.The package comes with 4 kinds of bristles with different softness that can meet your daily needs. Our soft bristle brush is mainly for cleaning dust like the dashboard, center console, and screen, the fine bristle brush is mainly for cleaning small debris, and the thick fiber brush is mainly for cleaning difficult to clean gaps. You can choose different bristles according to your needs 2.The curved design of long and short bristles makes it easily go deep into the air outlet to clean hidden dust. Our bristles trap the dust and will not scratch or streak your car 3.Dust removal soft bristle brush set has 3 pieces detail brushes and 2 pieces vent cleaning brushes for car. It can be used to clean door engines, handles, air vents, center consoles, front bumpers and other places. The bristles are not easy to fall off and will not scratch or scratch your car!
